title: This Drinks
description: Add custom potions that can be crafted and found in structures
body:
## 🧪 Custom Potions Plugin
A flexible, optimized plugin for creating, brewing, and distributing unique potions with full config control and placeholder support.

### ✨ Features
- ⚙️ **Configurable Messages**: Customize all plugin texts with **placeholder support**
- 🎨 **Visual Customization**:
  - Color codes & HEX-based potion color editing
  - Custom names and lore per potion
- 🧪 **Potion Settings**:
  - Type selection: `POTION`, `SPLASH_POTION`, `LINGERING_POTION`
  - ✅ **Custom Potion Brewing**: Brew your potions directly in-game via vanilla brewing stands
- 🎲 **Drop & Loot Control**:
  - Configure mob drops, structure loot, and acquisition odds
- 🚀 **Optimized Core**: Strong refactoring for better performance and stability

### 🔗 Placeholders (PlaceholderAPI)
| Placeholder | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `%thisdrinks_total_drunk%` | Total custom potions consumed by the player |
| `%thisdrinks_drink_<ID>%` | Times player drank a specific potion (e.g. `%thisdrinks_drink_rainbow_essence%`) |
| `%thisdrinks_total_brewed%` | Total custom potions brewed by the player |

> 💡 *Use placeholders in messages, lore, titles, or scoreboards to track player progress.*

### 🌍 Languages
- ✅ English *(more coming soon)*

### 🖼️ Preview
<details>
<summary>Click to expand screenshots</summary>

![p1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebd6126400e5903c88a8c0e33d493670500ce62e.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0bf7a103c2ef03581fd5a5b9345210da587423b.png)

</details>

### ⌨️ Commands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/nds give` | Give a custom potion to a player |

> 💡 *All features are configurable via `config.yml` — tweak brewing recipes, drop rates, placeholders, and visuals without code changes.*
